title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 544.620 - What deemed a surrender
text:
544.620.  What deemed a surrender. — The bailor must deliver a certified copy of the recognizance to the sheriff with the principal, and the sheriff must accept the surrender of the principal, and acknowledge such acceptance in writing.
(RSMo 1939 § 3971) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3582; 1919 § 3925; 1909 § 5132
